$comment: Single source of truth for browser-categorized Pyreon packages. Consumed by: packages/tools/lint/src/rules/architecture/require-browser-smoke-test.ts (default package list) + scripts/check-browser-smoke.ts (CI enforcement) + .claude/rules/test-environment-parity.md (human docs, kept in sync manually). Add a package here when you ship it as browser-running; the lint rule + CI gate start requiring a browser smoke test within the next push.
